seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 200 words, with no paragraph exceeding 50 words.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain at least 200 words, with no paragraph exceeding 50 words.
response:
Subject: Approval of Your Upcoming Vacation Request

Dear Team Member, I am writing to formally confirm that your request for vacation time has been fully approved by management after careful review of your current workload and project timelines. We truly appreciate your dedication and hard work over the past few months, and we believe this well-deserved break is essential for maintaining your long-term well-being and professional growth within our organization.

Please ensure that all your current tasks are handed over to the appropriate colleagues before your departure date to guarantee a smooth workflow during your absence. You should also update your calendar status and notify any external clients or stakeholders who may need to be informed about your temporary unavailability during this specific period of time.

We look forward to seeing you return refreshed and ready to tackle new challenges with renewed energy and enthusiasm. Please feel free to reach out if you need any assistance with planning your handover or if you have any questions regarding your return schedule. Enjoy your time off, and we hope you have a wonderful and relaxing experience away from the office.
